ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Average elevation of the county in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_indexes" (
  "aqi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county associated with the AQI data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "max_aqi" INTEGER /* Maximum AQI recorded */,
  "percentile_90_aqi" INTEGER /* 90th percentile AQI value */,
  "median_aqi" INTEGER /* Median AQI value */,
  "min_aqi" INTEGER /* Minimum AQI recorded */,
  "average_aqi" REAL /* Average AQI value */,
  "aqui_25th_percentile" INTEGER /* 25th percentile AQI value */,
  "aqui_75th_percentile" INTEGER /* 75th percentile AQI value */,
  "pollutant_type" TEXT /* Type of pollutant */,
  "pollutant_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the pollutant */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the AQI data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_stats" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education stat record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county associated with the education statistics */,
  "high_school_diploma_percent" REAL /* Percentage of adults with a high school diploma only */,
  "bachelor_degree_percent" REAL /* Percentage of adults with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the education statistics were collected */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "high_school_diploma_total" INTEGER /* Total number of adults with a high school diploma */,
  "bachelor_degree_total" INTEGER /* Total number of adults with a bachelor's degree */,
  "graduate_degree_percent" REAL /* Percentage of adults with a graduate degree */,
  "graduate_degree_total" INTEGER /* Total number of adults with a graduate degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_stats_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Average elevation of the state in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county associated with the accessed data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date and time of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy recommendation */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Description of the policy recommendation */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Justification for the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy recommendation (e.g., proposed, approved, rejected) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date and time of the policy */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is expected to be implemented */,
  "responsible_entity" TEXT /* Entity responsible for implementing the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* User ID of the lead researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL for the project's website or repository */,
  "co_investigators" TEXT /* IDs of co-investigators involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaboration is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
